# tenableio_scanners (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of scanners from Tenable.io.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all scanners
data "tenableio_scanners" "all" {}

output "scanner_names" {
  value = [for s in data.tenableio_scanners.all.scanners : s.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `scanners` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scanners))

<a id="nestedatt--scanners"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scanners`

Read-Only:

- `creation_date` (Number)
- `engine_version` (String)
- `id` (Number)
- `last_modification_date` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `network_name` (String)
- `owner` (String)
- `platform` (String)
- `pool` (Boolean)
- `scan_count` (Number)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `uuid` (String)
